description: woodland - the giant in the outdoor shoe industry, comes up with this rugged shoe with a refined stance. This two-hole lace up suede shoe also references the conservative derby in its styling. Wear this with chinos or denims and a checked casual shirt or a tee. Style this with a rugged belt.UpperTwo tone leather upper with aggressive stitch detailing and embossed branding on the lateral side of the heelStitches on the seams of the toe boxTwo-hole lace upsPadded tonguePadded insole for in-step comfortRemovable sockliner to accommodate an orthoticOutsole reinforced onto the upper at the heel MidsoleRubber midsoleOutsoleDual density TPU outsole with geometric lugs for grip and tractionShoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustUse a suede brush to remove dust from suede partsDo not machine wash
